scripts.electron:dev: cd ../client && VITE_BASE='./' bun run build && vite build && electron .
scripts.electron:build: cd ../client && VITE_BASE='./' bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder --mac --win
scripts.electron:build:mac:local: cd ../client && VITE_BASE='./' bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:mac:release: cd ../client && VITE_BASE='./' bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: cd ../client && VITE_BASE='./' bun run build && cd ../client-electron && vite build && electron-builder --win
